definitions.text: The descriptive heading or title, of a document or part thereof.
A title or brief explanation attached to an illustration, cartoon, user interface element, etc.
A piece of text appearing on screen as a subtitle or other part of a film or broadcast, describing dialogue (and sometimes other sound) for viewers who cannot hear.
To add captions to a text or illustration.
examples: Only once the drawing is done will the letterer caption it.

definitions.text: To add captions to a film or broadcast.
